name: Jane Doe
summary: Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience in building scalable web applications and leading cross-functional teams. Expert in Python, cloud architecture, and DevOps practices. Passionate about clean code, mentoring, and delivering impactful solutions.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Led a team of 6 engineers to deliver a microservices platform serving 2M+ daily active users
Reduced API response time by 40% through database query optimization and caching strategies
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, reducing deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes
Designed event-driven architecture using Kafka, processing 1M+ events per day
Mentored 3 junior developers through structured code review process, accelerating their growth

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built RESTful APIs handling 500K+ daily requests using Python and FastAPI
Designed and implemented real-time notification system using WebSockets serving 100K users
Migrated legacy monolith to microservices architecture, reducing infrastructure costs by 30%
Developed automated testing suite achieving 95% code coverage
Collaborated with product team to define technical specifications for 15+ features

experience.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Developed responsive web applications using React and Node.js for 20+ clients
Optimized database queries reducing page load time by 60%
Implemented authentication and authorization using OAuth 2.0 and JWT
